caption: A man with blonde hair, glasses, and white headphones is speaking into a black microphone in a room with a decorated Christmas tree and a framed picture behind him. He wears a navy blue textured shirt and a gold chain. Across the first three segments, he talks expressively, gesturing with his left hand and touching his forehead. The scene then shifts to a digital screen featuring a large, glowing gold letter "Z" centered in a dark room with red accents and banners. In the bottom left corner of this final view, a small picture-in-picture window shows the man continuing to speak. Text appearing on this screen includes "SMALL PRESENT" in the upper left and a menu at the bottom with the options "MARK UNMARK," "DISMISS ALL," and "BACK."
